name: USAOPOLY Flip 7, The Ultimate Blend of Press Your Luck & Strategy, Fast-Paced Addictive Card Game,Quick to Learn & Easy to Teach,Perfect for Game Nights, 3+ Players, Ages 8 & Up, 20 Minutes Play Time
bullets: Play it Safe or Risk it All? - In Flip7, you will press your luck by getting dealt cards without revealing the same number twice.
How to Win - Be the first to reach 200 points in this intense press-your-luck game that tests your risk-taking and strategy abilities.
Beware of Busting - Rack up points based on the total number value of the cards in front of you but watch out for duplicate numbers that can bust you out of the round.
Unique Playing Deck - The deck is stacked with multiples of each number, from twelve 12’s, eleven 11’s and so on, along with special action and modifier cards for added excitement.
Exciting Action Cards: Flip 7 includes Flip Three, Freeze, Second Chance, and Score Modifier cards, adding twists and turns to every round.
description: Flip over cards one by one without flipping the same number twice. Sound easy? Think again! This isn't just any deck of cards… In Flip 7™ there's only one 1 card, two 2's, three 3’s, etc. plus a bunch of special cards that can score you extra points, give you a second chance, or freeze you or your opponents in your tracks. Are you the type of player to play it safe and bank points before you bust, or are you going to risk it all and go for the bonus points by flipping over seven in a row? Press your luck meets strategy in this addictive card game that's sure to be the greatest card game you’ve

reviews.name: Moe
reviews.title: Game Night Favorite That’s Easy to Learn and Fun for Everyone
reviews.body: I picked up Flip 7 for my monthly game night, and we played it the other night. It was an instant hit. We watched a quick rules video and were able to start playing within minutes, which is always a win when no one’s in the mood for a long explanation.It’s super easy to learn but still has enough strategy to keep things interesting. One of those games where anyone can jump in, whether they’re…

reviews.name: Mason
reviews.title: Perfect for All Ages - Even Won Over My Game-Hating Mom
reviews.body: I just had the wonderful game night with this one - we had players ranging from 6 years old to 80+, plus a couple folks in their 40s, and everyone genuinely enjoyed it. The rules were quick to pick up, which made it easy to get everyone playing right away.But here’s the real test: my mother, who normally refuses to play any games, actually had fun with this one. That’s the highest praise I can…

reviews.name: Shaylee
reviews.title: Fun family card game for little kids too
reviews.body: The media could not be loaded. This is a great family card game. It’s easy to learn and explain to even my 4 year old. It teaches them math skills and how to take consider risks. It doesn’t normally take very long to play so their attention span lasts throughout the whole game. Fun good quality cards!

reviews.name: Jeremy Fuhr
reviews.title: Quick & Easy Family Game
reviews.body: Very easy to play, somewhat addicting game. It is a "press your luck" black jack style of game that the whole family enjoys. It is my 5-year-olds favorite game.
